houses.title: Luxury 3BR Apartment in Westlands
houses.description: A stunning modern apartment in the heart of Westlands with panoramic city views. Features high-end finishes, a fully fitted kitchen, and access to a rooftop pool. Walking distance to major malls and business hubs.

houses.title: Spacious 2BR Bungalow in Karen
houses.description: Beautiful bungalow set in a serene Karen neighborhood with lush gardens. Perfect for families seeking tranquility while remaining close to the city. Features a large compound ideal for children.

houses.title: Modern Studio in Kilimani
houses.description: Compact and modern studio apartment ideal for young professionals. Located in the trendy Kilimani area with easy access to restaurants, cafes, and nightlife.

houses.title: 4BR Villa with Pool in Runda
houses.description: Exquisite villa in the prestigious Runda estate. Features a private swimming pool, manicured gardens, and a detached guest house. Ideal for executives and diplomatic families.

houses.title: Beachfront 3BR Apartment in Nyali
houses.description: Wake up to ocean views every morning in this stunning beachfront apartment. Features direct beach access, a spacious balcony overlooking the Indian Ocean, and resort-like facilities.

houses.title: Old Town 2BR Swahili House
houses.description: Experience authentic coastal living in this beautifully restored Swahili-style house in historic Old Town Mombasa. Ornate carved doors, high ceilings, and a rooftop terrace with harbor views.

houses.title: Lakeside 3BR Townhouse in Milimani
houses.description: Elegant townhouse with breathtaking views of Lake Victoria. Situated in Kisumu's upmarket Milimani estate, featuring spacious rooms, modern kitchen, and a private garden.

houses.title: Budget 1BR in Kondele
houses.description: Affordable one-bedroom unit in Kondele, Kisumu. Clean, safe, and well-maintained. Walking distance to market and public transport. Ideal for singles and young couples.

houses.title: 3BR Family Home in Nakuru Town
houses.description: Comfortable family home in a quiet Nakuru neighborhood. Features a large compound, servant quarters, and easy access to Lake Nakuru National Park.

houses.title: 2BR Apartment near Nakuru CBD
houses.description: Well-appointed apartment just minutes from Nakuru CBD. Perfect for professionals working in the city. Features modern furnishings and reliable utilities.

houses.title: 3BR Home in Garissa Town
houses.description: Spacious family home in a secure Garissa neighborhood. Features cross-ventilation for hot climate comfort, a large compound, and reliable water supply from a borehole.

houses.title: 2BR Apartment in Eldoret CBD
houses.description: Modern apartment in Eldoret's thriving CBD. Ideal for professionals and business owners. Features uninterrupted water supply and 24-hour security.

houses.title: Beachfront Cottage in Watamu
houses.description: Charming coral-stone cottage steps from Watamu Beach. Perfect for a seaside retreat. Features a verandah facing the ocean and access to Watamu Marine National Park.

houses.title: 3BR Maisonette in Machakos Town
houses.description: Beautiful maisonette in a gated community in Machakos. Features a rooftop terrace with views of the Machakos Hills and a modern open-plan living area.

houses.title: 4BR Home in Ngong, Kajiado
houses.description: Spacious family home in the cool highlands of Ngong. Features an expansive compound, breathtaking views of the Ngong Hills, and a well-manicured garden.

houses.title: 2BR Apartment in Nyeri Town
houses.description: Modern apartment in Nyeri Town center. Located near Mount Kenya views and the famous Outspan Hotel. Quiet neighborhood ideal for families.

houses.title: 3BR Townhouse in Meru Town
houses.description: Elegant townhouse in Meru's best neighborhood. Surrounded by coffee and tea plantations. Features fresh highland air and close proximity to Mount Kenya.

houses.title: 2BR Apartment in Ruiru, Kiambu
houses.description: Affordable modern apartment in Ruiru, close to the Eastern Bypass. Perfect for professionals working in Nairobi looking for a quieter, more affordable option.

houses.title: 5BR Mansion in Muthaiga
houses.description: Grand mansion in Muthaiga — Nairobi's most exclusive address. Features a heated pool, wine cellar, home theater, and staff quarters. Perfect for high-net-worth families.

houses.title: 1BR Studio in South B, Nairobi
houses.description: Cozy and affordable studio apartment in South B. Clean, modern finishes with reliable utilities. Close to supermarkets and public transport.

houses.title: 3BR Apartment in Bamburi, Mombasa
houses.description: Modern apartment in Bamburi near the beach. Walking distance to Bamburi Beach and excellent nightlife. Features a rooftop pool with ocean views.

houses.title: 2BR Bungalow in Rongai
houses.description: Charming bungalow in quiet Rongai with a large compound. Perfect for families with children. Easy access to Nairobi via Rongai route matatus.

houses.title: 1BR Apartment in Thika, Kiambu
houses.description: Budget-friendly apartment in Thika town. Close to Thika Superhighway for easy commute to Nairobi. Clean and safe neighborhood.

houses.title: 4BR Executive Home in Gigiri
houses.description: Executive home in Gigiri near UN offices and embassies. Features diplomatic-grade security, a large pool, and beautifully landscaped gardens.

houses.title: 2BR Apartment in Kilifi Town
houses.description: Lovely apartment in Kilifi town with views of Kilifi Creek. Close to Bofa Beach and Kilifi Creek, perfect for beach lovers.

houses.title: 3BR Home in Nyeri Outskirts
houses.description: Peaceful family home on the outskirts of Nyeri with stunning views of Mount Kenya. Features a large garden with fruit trees and a fresh vegetable plot.

houses.title: 1BR Bedsitter in Eldoret
houses.description: Affordable bedsitter in Eldoret near MTRH hospital and Moi University. Ideal for medical staff, students and young professionals.

houses.title: 3BR Penthouse in Upper Hill
houses.description: Prestigious penthouse in Upper Hill with 360-degree city views. Features floor-to-ceiling windows, a private rooftop deck, and concierge services.

houses.title: 2BR Apartment in Kisumu West
houses.description: Well-maintained apartment in Kisumu West with sunset views over Lake Victoria. Close to the fishing port and the famous Dunga Beach.

houses.title: 5BR Colonial Home in Lavington
houses.description: Grand colonial home in the leafy Lavington suburb. Features original hardwood floors, a library, wine room, and a stunning rose garden. Rare heritage property.

houses.title: Garissa-Luxury
houses.description: This property is a luxurious 3 bedroom house with graet view and proximity to town

issues.title: Leaking bathroom tap
issues.description: The cold water tap in the main bathroom has been leaking for 3 days. Water is pooling on the floor.

issues.title: Broken window latch
issues.description: The latch on the bedroom window is broken and the window cannot be secured. Security concern.

issues.title: Power outage in kitchen
issues.description: The kitchen sockets have no power. Checked the fuse box but unable to identify the issue.
issues.adminNote: Electrician replaced faulty socket - resolved 25 Jan

issues.title: Leaking roof
issues.description: The roof has hole in it and has been leaking for a while now
issues.adminNote: A plumber will arrive on tuesday

bookings.rejectionNote: Property already booked for that period

reviews.comment: Great apartment in Kilimani. Very safe area and close to amenities. The management is responsive. Only downside is parking can be tight during evenings.
Absolutely loved our time in this Nakuru home! Spacious rooms, great compound for the kids. Would highly recommend to families.
Westlands location is unbeatable. The views are stunning and the building management is top-notch. Worth every shilling.

testimonials.name: Wambui Kariuki
testimonials.quote: RentEasy helped me find my dream apartment in Kilimani in just 3 days. The Fair Rent Estimator saved me from overpaying by 15%!

testimonials.name: Omar Farah
testimonials.quote: Finding a safe, verified home in Garissa used to be impossible. RentEasy changed everything. I moved in within a week of signing up.

testimonials.name: Njeri Muthoni
testimonials.quote: The RentScore feature helped me understand my tenant profile and I got approved faster. The escrow payment system is brilliant.

testimonials.name: Kevin Omondi
testimonials.quote: I relocated from Nairobi to Kisumu for work and RentEasy had a great selection of lakeside properties. Found a beautiful townhouse in Milimani.

testimonials.name: Amina Yusuf
testimonials.quote: The map view feature is fantastic — I could see exactly which properties were near Coast General Hospital before booking. Zero agent fees is a game-changer.

moveOutRequests.adminNote: Ok i'll send someone to view the house check if there's any issues then you can move out.
